content.query:
SELECT 
 count(SecureInfoID) as SubCategoryCount
,dis.description as SubCategory
,dis.description as PinsSubCategory
,'Disability' as Category
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_secure_info_fact] si
LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_disability_dim] dis
ON si.DisabilityID = dis.DisabilityID
Group BY dis.description

UNION

SELECT 
 count(SecureInfoID) as SubCategoryCount
,div.Description as SubCategory
,div.Description as PinsSubCategory
,'Diversity' as Category
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_secure_info_fact] si
LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_diversity_dim] div
ON si.DiversityID = div.DiversityID 
Group BY div.description

UNION

SELECT 
 count(SecureInfoID) as SubCategoryCount
,rel.Description as SubCategory
,rel.Description as PinsSubCategory
,'Religion' as Category
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_secure_info_fact] si
LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_religion_dim] rel
ON si.ReligionID = rel.ReligionID
Group BY rel.description

--Select * from  [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_religion_dim]
--Select distinct ReligionID from [hr_secure_info_fact]

UNION

SELECT 
 count(SecureInfoID) as SubCategoryCount
,sxo.Description as SubCategory
,sxo.Description as PinsSubCategory
,'SXO' as Category
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_secure_info_fact] si
LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_sxo_dim]  sxo
ON si.SXOID = sxo.SXOID
Group BY sxo.description

UNION

SELECT 
Count(EmployeeID) as SubCategoryCoun
 ,CASE
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 19 THEN '16-19'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 29 THEN '20-29'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 39 THEN '39-39'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 49 THEN '40-49'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 59 THEN '50-59'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 64 THEN '60-64'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) >= 65 THEN '65 & Over'
    ELSE 'Not Available' 
    END AS SubCategory
,''     as PinsSubCategory
,'Age'  as Category

 FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_fact] emp
 GROUP BY 
 CASE
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 19 THEN '16-19'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 29 THEN '20-29'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 39 THEN '39-39'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 49 THEN '40-49'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 59 THEN '50-59'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 64 THEN '60-64'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) >= 65 THEN '65 & Over'
    ELSE 'Not Available' 
    END
